name: Kevin Spacey

acts.description: Anthony Rapp accused him of making sexual advances when Rapp was 14; Spacey apologized 'if' anything happened while coming out as gay
Multiple subsequent sexual assault accusations from men over decades

behavior_summary: Anthony Rapp's 2017 accusation prompted dozens more. Criminal charges in the UK resulted in acquittal. Civil case from Anthony Rapp was dismissed. Career destroyed regardless.

art.summary: Two-time Oscar winner, one of the most technically skilled actors of his generation. His performances are still on screen; his career is not.

verdict.blurb: Gave one of cinema's great villainous performances in The Usual Suspects and then spent decades apparently living the role offscreen. Acquitted, but the accusations came from everywhere.
